codeReview.summary: The commit localizes tray menu labels and adds locale-backed tooltip helpers, and the persisted ui_language path still appears intact. However, the new live-refresh path does not preserve the current tray tooltip state: both tray refresh implementations overwrite existing tooltip content with a generic loading message, and the app does not queue an immediate provider refresh after the language change. That misses the live tooltip requirements for both single-icon and per-provider tray modes.

issues.description: `TrayManager::refresh_language()` rebuilds the single-icon menu but then unconditionally replaces the current tooltip with `TrayLoading` (`rust/src/tray/manager.rs:512-514`). The caller in `rust/src/native_ui/app.rs:1885-1895` does not trigger `refresh_providers()` when only the language changes, so switching languages while the tray shows a normal or special state (usage, credits, no-providers, overlay state) regresses the tooltip to a generic loading message instead of live-localizing the active tooltip. This breaks VAL-I18N-006.

`MultiTrayManager::refresh_language()` rebuilds each provider menu but always rewrites every provider tooltip to `"{provider} - Loading"` (`rust/src/tray/manager.rs:860-862`). As with the single-tray path, `rust/src/native_ui/app.rs:1885-1895` does not queue a provider refresh after a pure language change, so per-provider trays do not keep their current normal/error/loading state text live through the language switch. This breaks VAL-I18N-007.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The recorded execution for this feature did not match the tray-localization worker procedure, but the handoff still marked `followedProcedure` as true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/home/fsos/Developer/Win-CodexBar/.factory/skills/tray-localization-worker/SKILL.md` requires TDD, baseline typecheck/build verification, and Wine/Xvfb tray evidence. `/home/fsos/.factory/missions/feb91986-560d-4e43-a848-dc0107da8c15/handoffs/2026-03-30T17-39-24-372Z__pr14-tray-localization-refresh__9537f8f5-99b5-4383-bd25-c1bf668ba02b.json` records only `cargo test` and `cargo fmt` with no interactive checks, while `handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure` is `true`. The matching session in `/home/fsos/.factory/missions/feb91986-560d-4e43-a848-dc0107da8c15/worker-transcripts.jsonl` also did not contain `cargo build`, `cargo check`, `tdd`, `verification-before-completion`, `wine`, or `xvfb` steps.

summary: Review failed: live tray language switching does not preserve the current tooltip state. Both single-icon and per-provider refresh paths replace existing tooltip text with a generic loading message, so the feature does not satisfy VAL-I18N-006 or VAL-I18N-007 even though the language persistence path for VAL-I18N-008 appears present.
